name: Honoka Maki
description: Maki is first introduced along with the other main cast after [Noriko Sonozaki](https://anilist.co/character/89295/Noriko-Sonozaki) confronts [Katsuhira Agata](https://anilist.co/character/89294/Katsuhira-Agata) about the Kizna Project. Her sin is revealed to be "Pride". She, along with the other Kiznaivers are then abducted by the Gomorin and has her senses connected together.
